subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-02-24 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: The wisdom of my sojourn here in Paris, as well as the results it will yield, consist in the admonitions I have imparted to the people of the East
subcodes.first_line_orig: حکمت و نتیجهٴ اقامت در پاریس برای تذکّر مشرقیان و آگاهی ایرانیان بیش از اهالی خود پاریس است
subcodes.subjects: @critique of Eastern values; culture, @East and West; communication between East and West, @past, present and future of Iran
